1.name: Phase 1 — The Dashboard
1.deliverable: Tactical bridge: Go TUI over Python's api_server HTTP+SSE boundary

2.name: Phase 2 — The Gateway
2.deliverable: Go-native operator wiring harness: tools, Telegram, shared gateway chassis, shipped cron, and the first OS-AI spine slices before the long-tail adapter flood

items.name: Bridge-vs-native runtime decision
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/whatsapp.DecideRuntime now freezes a bridge-first Baileys seam, attach-vs-launch lifecycle planning, bot/self-chat mode selection, and shared-parser command passthrough before transport startup.

items.name: Inbound normalization + command passthrough
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/whatsapp.NormalizeInbound normalizes bridge/native peer IDs and routes generic slash commands through gateway.ParseInboundText.

items.name: Pairing, reconnect, and send contract
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/whatsapp.Bot now starts the bridge in bot or self-chat mode, reconnects on disconnect with a deterministic backoff schedule, and records original chat JIDs plus reply-to message IDs for shared-chassis sends.

items.name: Gateway session store + SessionSource parity
items.note: TDD landed: gateway session-ID resolution now prefers stored handles, falls back deterministically to the chat-scoped key on empty/error paths, and freezes SessionSource/session-context prompt contracts in gateway tests.

items.name: SessionContext prompt injection
items.note: TDD landed: each inbound submit now injects a stable Current Session Context system block ahead of recall/user messages, covering source metadata plus deterministic delivery-target exposure.

items.name: DeliveryRouter + --deliver target parsing
items.note: TDD landed: --deliver parsing now covers origin/local/platform/platform:chat/platform:chat:thread forms with explicit invalid-shape tests before future adapter routing binds them to live channels.

items.name: Gateway stream consumer for agent-event fan-out
items.note: TDD landed: a typed GatewayStreamConsumer contract now replays one render frame to multiple delivery targets in deterministic order and preserves later deliveries when one sink fails.

items.name: Inbound event normalization + session identity
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/signal.NormalizeInbound now freezes Signal DM/group chat IDs, generic slash passthrough, and alternate phone/UUID session identity before client wiring.

items.name: Reply/send contract on shared chassis
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/signal.Bot now records reply metadata from normalized inbound events and routes shared-chassis sends back to direct recipients or native group IDs with reply-to preservation.

items.name: Email ingress + outbound delivery contract
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/email now normalizes RFC 822 MIME bodies into plaintext gateway events and derives deterministic reply-thread targets before IMAP or SMTP transport glue.

items.name: SMS ingress + outbound delivery contract
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/sms.NormalizeInbound now canonicalizes phone-number session keys, delegates generic slash commands through gateway.ParseInboundText, and BuildDelivery splits outbound replies into natural-boundary 1600-rune segments for future Twilio sends.

items.name: Threaded text adapter contract suite
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/threadtext freezes canonical thread IDs, gateway inbound normalization, and reply-target derivation before Matrix/Mattermost transport work.

items.name: Matrix + Mattermost transport wiring
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/matrix.Bot and internal/channels/mattermost.Bot now normalize threaded-text ingress into gateway.InboundEvent, ignore self/empty transport events, and preserve Matrix thread roots plus Mattermost root-post metadata for outbound replies via internal/channels/threadtext.ReplyTracker.

items.name: Signed event parsing + auth gates
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/webhook.ParseInbound now enforces body-size and event-filter gates, and ValidateSignature freezes GitHub, GitLab, and generic HMAC auth before any HTTP runtime wiring.

items.name: Prompt-to-delivery routing bridge
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/webhook now renders prompt and deliver_extra templates, derives deterministic webhook session chat IDs, and resolves typed gateway delivery targets including thread aliases.

items.name: BlueBubbles + HomeAssistant adapters
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/bluebubbles and internal/channels/homeassistant now freeze webhook-auth, cached home-channel delivery, filtered state-change formatting, cooldown, and persistent-notification contracts before any SDK wiring.

items.name: Feishu + WeChat/WeCom adapters
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/feishu, internal/channels/wecom, and internal/channels/weixin now pin webhook or websocket ingress, policy-gated delivery, and per-platform reply-path contracts before any SDK wiring.

items.name: DingTalk + QQ Bot adapters
items.note: TDD landed: internal/channels/dingtalk and internal/channels/qqbot now cover allow-list policy, mention-gated ingress, and webhook or passive-reply delivery contracts with adapter-focused tests before any runtime wiring.

2.E.1.name: OS-AI Spine: Delegation Policy + Child Execution

items.name: Runner-enforced tool allowlists + blocked-tool policy
items.note: TDD landed: blocked-tool and allowlist tests now cover the runner execution seam before any child tool call reaches the executor.

items.name: Tool-call audit in typed child results
items.note: TDD landed: manager/result and delegate_task output tests now require typed child tool-call events to survive into terminal result envelopes.

items.name: Real child Hermes stream loop
items.note: TDD landed: HermesRunner now executes a real child OpenStream loop with token/output streaming, multi-iteration tool_calls continuation through executeChildTool, explicit stream-open error handling, and registry wiring that opts delegate_task into the real runner whenever a live Hermes client is available.

items.name: Canonical CommandDef registry
items.note: TDD landed: internal/gateway now owns one CommandRegistry with ResolveCommand, ParseInboundText, registry-derived help output, and canonical alias handling for /start -> /help.

items.name: Gateway slash dispatch + per-platform exposure
items.note: TDD landed: Telegram and Discord parse through the shared gateway command layer, the manager welcome/help text is registry-driven, and deterministic Telegram/Slack exposure helpers now derive from the same source of truth.

items.name: Gateway per-event hook registry
items.note: TDD landed: manager lifecycle tests now lock before/after receive, direct and placeholder-backed before/after send, and on_error hook emission on the shared gateway boundary.

items.name: Hook manifest discovery + handler loading
items.note: TDD landed: HOOK.yaml directories now load executable command handlers with exact, prefix-wildcard, and global event matching, and `gormes gateway` wires the XDG hooks root into the live manager.

items.name: Built-in BOOT.md startup hook
items.note: TDD landed: gateway startup now reads $XDG_DATA_HOME/gormes/BOOT.md, runs it through an isolated background boot kernel, and treats missing files or boot execution failures as non-blocking startup conditions.

items.name: Graceful restart drain + managed shutdown
items.note: TDD landed: manager shutdown tests now lock drain-until-idle, shutdown timeout, submit rejection during shutdown, and signal-driven root-context cancellation only after the drain path returns.

items.name: Pairing state + status surfaces
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/gateway.PairingStore` now persists normalized pending/approved records at the XDG pairing-state path, `/status` renders a deterministic channel + pairing readout, and `gormes gateway` wires the shared store into the live manager.

items.name: Home channel ownership + notify-to routing
items.note: TDD landed: internal/gateway.HomeChannels now records /sethome ownership metadata, manager-owned acknowledgements, and platform-only delivery targets resolve to configured home channels for notify-to routing.

items.name: Channel/contact directory
items.note: TDD landed: internal/gateway.ChannelDirectory now records normalized inbound chat/contact metadata, resolves chat IDs or human-readable channel names, invalidates stale rename aliases, and is wired into Manager inbound handling before future persistence.

items.name: Mirror + sticker cache surfaces
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/gateway.StateMirror` now exports home-channel ownership plus `ChannelDirectory` snapshots to `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/channel_directory.json` with deterministic refresh wiring in `gormes gateway`, and `internal/gateway.StickerCache` freezes normalized key persistence at `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/sticker_cache.json` before adapter-specific sticker sends land.

3.name: Phase 3 — The Black Box (Memory)
3.deliverable: SQLite + FTS5 + ontological graph + semantic fusion in Go; 3.E closes session visibility, audit trails, decay, and cross-chat/session boundaries

items.name: Read-only bbolt sessions.db -> index.yaml mirror
items.note: TDD: shipped internal/session SessionIndexMirror with fixed YAML shape, lexically ordered bbolt key export, and atomic temp-file rewrite semantics.

items.name: Deterministic mirror refresh without mutating session state
items.note: TDD: shipped a deterministic background refresh loop plus TUI/gateway/telegram runtime wiring, skipping unchanged snapshots while keeping the bbolt session map read-only.

items.name: Append-only JSONL writer + schema
items.note: TDD: shipped internal/audit JSONL append writer with a stable envelope (timestamp/source/session_id/agent_id/tool/args/duration_ms/status/result_size_bytes/error) and order-preserving tests.

items.name: Kernel + delegate_task audit hooks
items.note: TDD: kernel executeToolCalls now emits audit records, and delegated child-tool execution under delegate_task appends the same JSONL schema through the subagent runtime.

items.name: Outcome, duration, and error capture
items.note: TDD: RED/GREEN coverage locks duration_ms, status, and error population for successful and failed tool executions, including delegated child-tool runs.

items.name: gormes session export <id> --format=markdown
items.note: Shipped with Cobra wiring and clean missing-session handling; tests pin CLI shape and not-found behavior.

items.name: Render turns, tool calls, and timestamps from SQLite
items.note: Markdown export now reads SQLite turns, renders deterministic ordering/timestamps, and includes persisted tool-call metadata.

items.name: gormes memory status command
items.note: TDD: shipped `gormes memory status` with a SQLite-backed extractor summary, heuristic worker health, and recent dead-letter rendering.

items.name: Extractor queue depth + dead-letter summary
items.note: TDD: added deterministic dead-letter error aggregation to `gormes memory status`, with fixture-backed queue, summary, and CLI rendering coverage.

items.name: Append-only daily usage.jsonl writer
items.note: TDD landed: internal/insights now appends normalized DailyRollup records to usage.jsonl with schema-locked JSONL lines and deterministic append ordering.

items.name: Session, token, and cost rollups from local runtime
items.note: TDD: shipped fixture-driven daily rollups plus a telemetry.Snapshot bridge for session counts, token totals, cost sums, and per-model breakdowns.

items.name: Relationship last_seen tracking
items.note: TDD landed: schema v3g adds relationships.last_seen, backfills legacy rows from updated_at, graph upserts advance last_seen without rewriting updated_at, and recall decay now ages edges via COALESCE(NULLIF(last_seen, 0), updated_at).

items.name: Deterministic weight attenuation at recall time
items.note: TDD landed: recall-time decay is now wired through RecallDecayHorizonDays, fixed-clock recall_sql coverage, and ranking assertions that preserve raw fence weights while attenuating candidate ordering.

items.name: user_id concept above chat_id
items.note: TDD landed: internal/session now persists per-session source/chat/user metadata, resolves canonical user_id bindings above chat_id, inherits known chat bindings for resumed sessions, and rejects conflicting chat-to-user merges.

items.name: Cross-chat entity merge + recall fence
items.note: TDD landed: internal/memory recall now enforces same-chat default scoping, widens cross-chat only when callers opt into canonical user_id scope via internal/session bindings, and applies optional source filters deterministically; execution follow-up now focuses on tool-schema visibility and operator evidence.

items.name: parent_session_id lineage for compression splits
items.note: TDD landed: internal/session.Metadata now persists parent_session_id + lineage_kind with roots defaulting to primary, rejects self-parent and trivial lineage loops, and sessions/index.yaml now surfaces parent_session_id, lineage_kind, and lineage_orphan audit fields without widening recall scope.

items.name: Source-filtered FTS/session search across chats
items.note: TDD landed: internal/memory.SearchMessages and SearchSessions now search canonical user_id-bound sessions with optional source allowlists and latest-turn ordering, and internal/goncho honcho_search/context accept opt-in scope=user + sources[] without widening default same-chat behavior; execution follow-up now adds lineage-aware hits and operator-auditable search evidence.

4.name: Phase 4 — The Brain Transplant
4.deliverable: Native Go agent orchestrator + prompt builder
4.dependency_note: Build priority: 2.E0 deterministic subagent runtime -> 2.G static skills + reviewed candidate flow -> runner-enforced delegation policy + wider gateway surface -> native agent loop

items.name: Anthropic
items.note: TDD landed: internal/hermes.NewClient now selects a native Anthropic Messages API adapter that folds system prompts, translates assistant tool_use + user tool_result blocks, streams reasoning/text/tool_calls back into canonical Event values, and wires cmd/gormes, doctor, gateway, and telegram through provider-aware endpoint resolution.

items.name: Bedrock
items.note: TDD landed: internal/hermes.NewClient now selects a native Bedrock ConverseStream adapter that resolves AWS region defaults, delegates credential loading and SigV4 request signing to the AWS SDK, maps canonical system/user/assistant/tool messages into Bedrock tool-aware payloads, streams reasoning/text/tool_calls back into canonical Event values, and classifies Bedrock throttling/service failures as retry-safe HTTPError results without live AWS credentials in tests.

items.name: Gemini
items.note: TDD landed: internal/hermes.NewClient now routes gemini/google-gemini providers to a native Gemini API adapter that folds system prompts into system_instruction parts, translates assistant functionCall plus user functionResponse history into streamGenerateContent payloads, maps streamed text/functionCall chunks back into canonical Event values, and wires cmd/gormes health checks through the Gemini models endpoint with provider-aware labeling.

items.name: OpenRouter
items.note: TDD landed: internal/hermes.NewClient now routes openrouter providers to a native OpenRouter chat-completions adapter that preserves canonical system/user/assistant/tool history plus assistant tool_calls into /api/v1/chat/completions requests, reuses the OpenAI-compatible stream parser for reasoning/text/tool_calls events, and wires cmd/gormes health checks plus provider labeling through /api/v1/models.

items.name: Google Code Assist
items.note: TDD landed: internal/hermes.NewClient now routes google-gemini-cli/google-code-assist providers to a native Cloud Code Assist adapter that reuses Gemini request translation inside the cloudcode-pa project/model envelope, authenticates with bearer tokens, unwraps streamed text/functionCall chunks back into canonical Event values, resolves the legacy cloudcode-pa://google marker to Google's live endpoint, and wires cmd/gormes health checks through loadCodeAssist with optional project IDs from GORMES_GEMINI_PROJECT_ID, HERMES_GEMINI_PROJECT_ID, or GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT.

items.name: Codex
items.note: TDD landed: internal/hermes.NewClient now routes codex/openai-codex providers to a native OpenAI Responses API adapter that folds system prompts into instructions, translates assistant function_call + function_call_output history and tool descriptors into /v1/responses input items, streams output_text/reasoning/function-call deltas back into canonical Event values, and wires cmd/gormes health checks through /v1/models with codex-aware provider labels.

items.name: Long session management
items.note: TDD landed: internal/contextengine now freezes UpdateModelContext + get_status state, tracks last prompt/completion totals, and plans request history by preserving system context plus newest turn groups within the threshold; internal/kernel applies that planner before provider calls. Verified with go test ./internal/contextengine ./internal/kernel.

items.name: Context compression
items.note: TDD landed: internal/contextengine now freezes threshold floor math, prompt-token tracking, SummaryBudget scaling/clamping, StepDownContextLength probe tiers, and the ineffective-compression cooldown behind go test ./internal/contextengine.

items.name: System + memory + tools + history assembly
items.note: TDD landed: internal/kernel/prompt_builder.go now assembles per-turn system blocks (session context, recall output, and any skill block), stable tool descriptors, and accumulated multi-turn history into hermes.ChatRequest values, with second-turn coverage locked in internal/kernel/prompt_builder_test.go and go test ./internal/kernel.

items.name: Per-turn model selection
items.note: TDD landed: internal/kernel/model_routing.go now applies conservative same-provider simple-turn selection, internal/kernel/kernel.go carries the effective model through hermes.ChatRequest, telemetry, and render frames, and coverage lives in internal/kernel/model_routing_test.go plus internal/config/config_test.go with go test ./internal/kernel ./internal/config.

items.name: Self-monitoring telemetry
items.note: TDD: shipped per-session turn outcome counters, tool execution totals/failures/cancellations, and TUI sidebar rendering from the live telemetry snapshot.

items.name: Auto-naming sessions
items.note: TDD: shipped deterministic first-exchange session titles via `internal/session/title.go`; gateway and TUI persistence now store titles in session metadata, and the session index mirror exposes them for auditability.

items.name: Token vault
items.note: TDD: `internal/config/token_vault.go` now loads `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/auth.json` credential-pool entries plus provider token files under `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/auth/*.json` before env/flag overrides, and coverage lives in `internal/config/config_test.go` plus `cmd/gormes/llm_client_test.go` with `go test ./internal/config ./cmd/gormes`.

items.name: OAuth browser flow
items.note: TDD: `internal/config/google_oauth.go` now runs the Google Code Assist PKCE browser callback flow, persists refreshable `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/auth/google_oauth.json` credentials, and refreshes expired access tokens when `internal/config/token_vault.go` resolves provider tokens; `cmd/gormes/auth.go` adds `gormes auth login google-gemini-cli --accept-google-oauth-risk`, with coverage in `internal/config/google_oauth_test.go` and `cmd/gormes/auth_test.go` via `go test ./internal/config ./cmd/gormes`.

items.name: Multi-account auth
items.note: TDD: `internal/config` now resolves named `[hermes].account` / `[[hermes.accounts]]` entries into the active provider, endpoint, model, and API key, with `GORMES_ACCOUNT` overriding the config-selected account before the existing env/flag precedence applies.

items.name: Provider-side resilience
items.note: TDD: `internal/hermes/errors.go` now preserves provider `Retry-After` hints on retryable HTTP errors across the native adapters, and `internal/kernel/retry.go` uses `max(jittered backoff, Retry-After)` before reconnecting after 429 / transient provider failures.

5.name: Phase 5 — The Final Purge
5.deliverable: Python tool scripts ported to Go or WASM

items.name: Docker
items.note: Go-native backend seam now lives in internal/tools/environments/docker with tested docker run/exec/cleanup arg construction, security hardening, workspace persistence mounts, env forwarding, and container lifecycle caching.

items.name: Modal
items.note: Go-native backend seam now lives in internal/tools/environments/modal with tested config normalization, app lookup/create, task-scoped snapshot restore fallback, shell exec translation, env passthrough, and snapshot-on-cleanup termination.

items.name: Daytona
items.note: Go-native backend seam now lives in internal/tools/environments/daytona with tested resource normalization, persistent sandbox reuse, exec translation, and cleanup policy.

items.name: Singularity
items.note: Go-native backend seam now lives in internal/tools/environments/singularity with tested scratch-dir precedence, deterministic apptainer/singularity exec argv construction, persistent overlay reuse, and ephemeral scratch cleanup.

items.name: Chromedp
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/tools/browser_chromedp.go` now registers a Chromedp-backed `browser_navigate` tool with local Chrome/Chromium launch, `BROWSER_CDP_URL` remote allocator support, and deterministic body/html capture defaults via `cmd/gormes/registry.go`.

items.name: Rod
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/tools/browser_rod.go` now adds a Rod-backed `browser_navigate` path selected via `driver=rod` or `$BROWSER_DRIVER`, covering local launch plus remote `BROWSER_CDP_URL` attach parity through the shared browser tool contract.

items.name: Multimodal in/out
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/hermes` now carries canonical text+image content parts through the default HTTP client plus OpenRouter chat, Codex Responses, Anthropic Messages, Gemini/Google Code Assist, and Bedrock request builders using inline data-URL images.

items.name: Voice mode port
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/gateway/voice_mode.go` now ports the shared `/voice` control plane (`toggle|on|tts|off|status`), persists per-chat `off|voice_only|all` state to `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/gateway_voice_mode.json`, and wires `cmd/gormes/gateway.go` through the shared manager while keeping STT/TTS/transcription engines as explicit follow-on sidecar scope.

items.name: Skills hub
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/skills/hub.go` now syncs materialized `.hub/catalogs/<source>/.../SKILL.md` trees into the local `.hub/cache` + `lock.json`, installs hub refs into `active/`, and `cmd/gormes/skills.go` exposes `gormes skills sync`, `gormes skills list [--source=hub]`, and `gormes skills install <ref>` against `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/skills/`.

items.name: Skill registries
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/skills/registry.go` now defines `SkillMeta`, `SkillBundle`, `SkillReadinessStatus`, and `HubLockFile`, adds deterministic `FilesystemSource` + `StaticSource` discovery behind one `SkillSource` / `SourceRegistry` seam, and publishes the canonical bundled/official/Claude Marketplace/ClawHub/GitHub/Hermes Index/LobeHub/skills.sh registry catalog for future hub flows.

items.name: Skill auto-discovery
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/skills` now auto-discovers the active store plus configured external skill trees with local-name precedence, writes `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/.skills_prompt_snapshot.json` for the selected prompt block metadata, and `cmd/gormes/{main,gateway,telegram}.go` plus the BOOT hook now wire the live kernels through the shared runtime and usage logger.

items.name: MCP client
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/mcp/client.go` now launches stdio MCP servers, performs the `initialize` + `notifications/initialized` handshake with negotiated protocol-version validation, and exposes typed `tools/list` / `tools/call` RPC helpers backed by a subprocess transport loop. HTTP transport, dynamic toolset injection, sampling, and OAuth remain explicit follow-on scope.

items.name: OAuth flows
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/mcp/oauth.go` now ships a generic MCP OAuth 2.1 PKCE browser-callback flow, persists sanitized per-server `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/mcp-tokens/<server>{,.client}.json` state, and refreshes expired bearer tokens from cached client metadata when `LoadOAuthAccessToken` resolves a server token; `internal/mcp/oauth_test.go` covers login persistence plus refresh-backed reuse via `go test ./internal/mcp`.

items.name: ACP server side
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/acp/server.go` now ships the ACP stdio JSON-RPC baseline (`initialize`, `session/new`, `session/prompt`, `session/cancel`, `session/close`), `internal/acp/kernel_session.go` backs each ACP session with a live Gormes kernel turn loop, `cmd/gormes/acp.go` wires the Cobra entrypoint, and `acp_registry/agent.json` plus `acp_registry/icon.svg` advertise the editor manifest. Session/load, richer prompt content blocks, and ACP client fs/terminal callback bridges remain explicit follow-on scope.

items.name: Plugin SDK
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/plugins/manifest.go` now ships the typed `plugin.yaml` contract (`name`, `version`, metadata, `requires_env`, declared tools/hooks/skills/commands) plus deterministic on-disk discovery, and `pkg/gormes/types.go` re-exports `LoadPluginManifest` / `DiscoverPluginManifests` for external tooling. Plugin execution/loading, provider activation, and third-party runtime wiring remain follow-on scope under the separate `Third-party extensions` item.

items.name: Third-party extensions
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/plugins/runtime.go` now discovers manifest-backed third-party plugins from bundled (`./plugins`), user (`${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/plugins`), and opt-in project (`./.hermes/plugins`) roots; classifies general vs memory-provider vs context-engine plugins; reports missing `requires_env`; and applies disabled/selected provider config. `cmd/gormes/plugins.go` exposes that catalog as `gormes plugins list`, while `internal/config/config.go` now carries the XDG plugin root plus `[plugins]`, `[memory]`, and `[context]` selection state.

items.name: Dangerous action gating
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/tools/approval.go` now scans command-like JSON fields for dangerous shell payloads (`rm -rf`, shell `-c`, `curl|sh`) and fails closed with `ErrDangerousAction`; both `internal/tools/executor.go` and `internal/kernel/toolexec.go` now block execution before `Tool.Execute`, so direct kernel calls and delegated child tools share the same gate.

items.name: Sandboxed exec
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/tools/code_execution.go` now ships the Go-native `execute_code` tool plus `ProcessRegistry`/`ProcessSession`/`ExecuteResult`/`RunState`, running self-contained Go snippets through `go run` in scrubbed `strict` temp sandboxes or `project` workspaces under `.gormes/code-execution` with timeout and output caps. `cmd/gormes/registry.go` wires the tool into the default `code_execution` toolset; interactive debug sessions and recursive in-script tool RPC remain future follow-on scope outside the tracked checklist.

items.name: Atomic checkpoints
items.note: `internal/tools/checkpoints.go` now ships the Go-native shadow-repo checkpoint core with per-turn dedup, list/diff/restore flows, and pre-rollback snapshots under `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/checkpoints`; broader file read/write/patch tool ports remain future follow-on scope.

items.name: Multi-model coordination
items.note: `internal/tools/mixture_of_agents.go` now ships the Go-native `mixture_of_agents` tool with concurrent reference-model fanout, deterministic aggregation prompt construction, structured partial-failure reporting, and default-registry wiring under the `moa` toolset in `cmd/gormes/registry.go`. Availability follows OpenRouter credentials from `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` or `GORMES_PROVIDER=openrouter` + `GORMES_API_KEY`; retry/backoff tuning and deeper multi-layer MoA variants remain future follow-on scope.

items.name: Todo
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/tools/todo.go` now ports the per-session Todo tool core with a `TodoStore` (replace vs merge-by-id writes, duplicate-id collapsing, defensive-copy reads, status normalization, and `FormatForInjection` filtering to pending/in_progress for post-compression replay) plus a `TodoTool` that satisfies the shared `Tool` interface with JSON-summary output, and `cmd/gormes/registry.go` wires it under the dormant `todo` toolset gated on an injected per-session store.

items.name: Clarify
items.note: `internal/tools/clarify.go` now ships the Go-native clarify tool core with question/choice validation, a 120s timeout, structured JSON replies, and a pluggable host prompter seam; `cmd/gormes/registry.go` wires it into the dormant `clarify` toolset so interactive frontends can activate it by injecting a responder while broader 5.N operator-tool ports remain follow-on scope.

items.name: Session search
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/tools/session_search.go` now ships the Go-native `session_search` operator-tool core with a host-injected `SessionSearchBackend` seam, deterministic JSON output (mode=recent on empty query, mode=search otherwise), `[1, 5]` limit clamping, source allowlist normalization, and current-session exclusion; `cmd/gormes/registry.go` wires the dormant `session_search` toolset behind a backend-injection gate so future TUI/gateway frontends can attach an `internal/memory.SearchSessions`-backed adapter while LLM session summarization remains explicit follow-on scope.

items.name: Debug helpers
items.note: TDD landed: `internal/tools/debug_helpers.go` now ports the shared `DebugSession` helper with opt-in env gating, recursive redaction for sensitive fields, explicit `Save()` writes under `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/logs`, and no hidden filesystem writes before persistence.

items.name: OCI image
items.note: TDD landed: `gormes/Dockerfile` now ships a multi-stage `golang:1.26-bookworm` builder + Debian-slim runtime that produces a CGO-disabled static `./cmd/gormes` binary, installs under `/opt/gormes`, exports `GORMES_HOME=/opt/data` plus `XDG_DATA_HOME=/opt/data`, and declares `VOLUME ["/opt/data"]` so operators migrating from the upstream Hermes image keep the same bind mount. `gormes/docker/entrypoint.sh` bootstraps the canonical `cron/sessions/logs/hooks/memories/skills/plans/workspace/home` layout, honors `GORMES_UID`/`GORMES_GID` via `gosu` for bind-mount UID remap, and execs `gormes` after seeding `docker/SOUL.md` into the volume on first run. `gormes/.dockerignore` keeps `.git`, `bin/`, caches, and local env files out of the build context.

items.name: SSE streaming to Bubble Tea TUI

6.name: Phase 6 — The Learning Loop (Soul)
6.deliverable: Native skill extraction. Compounding intelligence. The feature Hermes doesn't have.

items.name: Heuristic or LLM-scored signal
items.note: TDD: `internal/learning/runtime.go` now scores successful turns on tool-call intensity, token volume, transcript size, and duration; `internal/kernel/kernel.go` records the signal after each completed turn, and the shared entrypoints append JSONL decisions to `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/gormes/learning/complexity.jsonl`.

items.name: LLM-assisted pattern distillation
items.note: TDD: `internal/learning/extractor.go` gates on the 6.A `Signal`, builds a deterministic prompt from the turn trace (user + assistant messages, tool events), consults a pluggable `LLM` seam, validates the distilled Name/Description/Body, and appends each accepted `Candidate` as JSONL for 6.C promotion. Skippable signals, nil seams, and invalid responses all short-circuit without touching disk.

items.name: Hybrid lexical + semantic lookup
items.note: TDD: `internal/skills/hybrid.go` adds a `SelectHybrid` entrypoint that fuses the existing token-overlap lexical scorer with cosine similarity over per-skill embeddings via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (k=60). The parallel `embeddings` slice lets callers pass nil per-skill for not-yet-embedded skills, a nil `queryEmbedding` collapses the function to a pure lexical selector (matching the legacy `Select` contract), mismatched vector dimensions contribute zero semantic score instead of panicking, and tied fused scores are broken deterministically by skill name then path.

items.name: Skill effectiveness scoring
items.note: TDD: `internal/learning/feedback.go` adds a `FeedbackStore` that appends per-turn outcomes as JSONL and aggregates them into per-skill `EffectivenessScore` records using Laplace smoothing `(successes+1)/(uses+2)`. Unseen skills receive a neutral 0.5 prior via `Weight`, so ranking code can multiply the score into relevance without special-casing fresh skills.

items.name: TUI + Telegram browsing
items.note: TDD: `internal/skills/browse.go` now ships a shared `BrowseView` plus `FormatBrowseSummary` helper consumed by a new gateway `/skills` command (`internal/gateway/skills_command.go`) and a reusable `internal/tui.RenderSkillsPane` surface. `cmd/gormes/skills_browser.go` wires the live hub into `gormes gateway` so Telegram + Discord operators browse installed and hub-available skills through the same deterministic view as the TUI.
